_notes.spacing_pct: Grid level spacing as % of price. 1.0% optimal for £150 capital (net 0.50%/fill vs 0.30% at 0.8%). Min viable: 0.55%.
_notes.range_pct: Recenter threshold: grid recenters when price moves more than this % from calibration_price. Also used as stale-order distance.
_notes.levels: Total grid orders. Regime-aware asymmetry: ranging=4buy/2sell, trending_up=4buy/2sell, trending_dn=2buy/4sell.
_notes.capital_pct: Fraction of total_capital to deploy (keep ≥20% as reserve). Auto-refreshed from live balance each run.
_notes.total_capital: Refreshed automatically from live crypto.com portfolio (USDT + BTC value) at each run. Manual value used as fallback.
_notes.gbp_usd_rate: GBP/USD rate for P&L reporting. Update in .env — currently ~1.32 (May 2026).
_notes.kill_pct: Weekly loss limit as fraction of total_capital (0.10 = 10%). Tightened to 0.08 in trending_dn regime.
_notes.minimum_capital: Formula: 0.0001 * BTC_price * levels / capital_pct / gbp_usd_rate. At BTC ~$105k: 6 levels → £75 min. Bot enforces this at runtime.
